title: Feature Scaling & Normalization
content_md:
# Normalization

```python
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
scaler = StandardScaler()
df['height_scaled'] = scaler.fit_transform(df[['height']])
```

Scaling ensures values are on similar ranges, helping models learn correctly.

questions.question: Why do we scale features?
questions.answer: To ensure equal influence in models.

questions.question: What happens if scaling is skipped?
questions.answer: Models may perform poorly or fail.

questions.question: Write code to scale an age column.
